message:
fix(messaging/stream): validate permit-stream identity on commit and prevent sequence burn on dedup failure

StreamAppendPermit:
- Remove Clone derive — permits are single-use and cloning would allow
  double-commit, violating the obligation lifecycle
- Add stream_name and region_id fields captured at reserve time
- Add committed: bool field with Drop debug_assert for leak detection
- Add PermitStreamMismatch error variant for cross-stream commit attempts
- Validate stream identity in commit_append(): reject if permit's
  captured (name, region) doesn't match the target stream

Stream::append:
- Refactor to delegate subject/accept checks to reserve_append(), keeping
  append() as a convenience wrapper over reserve + commit
- Fix sequence burn: a failed dedup/validation no longer increments the
  next sequence counter, so retried appends get the correct sequence

Tests:
- Replace RegionId::first() with test_region(1) for consistency
- Add permit_stream_mismatch_is_rejected test
- Add test verifying failed commit doesn't burn sequence numbers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
